title: Maze (clone trooper)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Maze|more=Alpha}} {{Update|[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Maze
Alpha-26 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} establishes that all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] were [[Gender/Legends|male]]. |pronouns=He/him''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Maze''', formerly known as '''Alpha-26''' or '''A-26''' was an [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class]] [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== Maze helped [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Arligan Zey]] oversee the extraction of [[Omega Squad]] from [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] following the success of their [[Mission to Qiilura|mission]]. Maze was stationed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for most of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]], assisting Zey. Maze developed a grudge against [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Ordo Skirata|Null-11]], nicknamed Ordo, when the latter beat Maze up when the captain attempted to lecture Ordo to obey [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]]. Maze managed to get his vengeance, however. After Ordo and the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of Omega Squad neutralized a terrorist cell on Coruscant, Maze attended a victory celebration held by [[Kal Skirata]]. When the men performed the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] war chant, ''[[Dha Werda Verda]]'', Ordo got his just desserts, with Maze "accidentally" punching him in the mouth several times. Maze and Ordo then walked off together. He would later be offered by Zey a chance to leave the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] if he ever wanted out. From this point on, Ordo feels he and Maze have a tacit understanding. As the war progressed, Maze used his downtime to read, and developed strong opinions about the state of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. While no fan of the political leadership under [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], he thought the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] should not interfere as they were not elected. During the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Maze returned to Special Operations Brigade headquarters to find Ordo and General Zey talking about the events leading to the purge. Ordo demanded to know from a wounded Zey if the Jedi did indeed try to overthrow Palpatine. Zey admitted to as much, stating that it was his duty as Palpatine had revealed himself to be a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], known as Darth Sidious. Most tellingly, Maze wondered what the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] were and Ordo explained that they were the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|exact opposite]] of the Jedi. Ordo left the two, Zey wounded slouching in a chair, and Maze with his blaster drawn, begging Zey to come quietly and as if he was just arresting him. Zey issued his last order, and asked Maze to execute him, as he knew what would happen if he was captured alive. Maze did not comply and missed Zey on purpose, giving Ordo the idea that he executed Zey. Later Maze contacted the Skirata Clan and asked for refuge on [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. [[Bardan Jusik]] was sent to retrieve Maze and unexpectedly met with Zey who was with Maze. After arriving on Mandalore, the two greeted a stunned and surprised Ordo. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1stID|Maze}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{1stID|A-26}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Alpha-26 |es=Alpha-26 |pl=A-26 }} [[Category:Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Clone trooper captains]] [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
